next: PERF-075: RSI_MR_BTC alternative strategy — standard RSI MR capped at SR=0.466 (<0.5). Explore RSI+BB squeeze or multi-timeframe RSI divergence to break ceiling. Also: regime model calibration audit (ECE=0.069 good, Brier=0.2 moderate — room for Platt scaling improvement).

PERF-074.title: Database connection reliability hardening + code dedup
PERF-074.description: (1) trade_executor.py: replaced raw sqlite3.connect(DB) with data.db.get_market_db(DB) — WAL mode + 10s busy_timeout, critical path for trade recording. (2) safety_check.py: migrated direct sqlite3.connect to get_market_db, removed sqlite3 import. (3) risk_monitor.py: migrated load_daily_pnl() to get_market_db, removed fragile delayed sqlite3 import in __main__. (4) trendfollow_adx_sweep.py: replaced 31-line local _compute_adx() with import from backtest.signal_gen — eliminates code duplication, ensures single ADX implementation.

impact.reliability: WAL + 10s busy_timeout for all critical-path DB access — prevents SQLITE_BUSY under concurrent access
impact.code_quality: Eliminated 31-line duplicate _compute_adx, removed 2 direct sqlite3 imports, centralized to data.db
impact.risk: LOW — get_market_db() returns sqlite3.Connection with identical API

PERF-073.title: BandMR_ETH deep DD reduction sweep — 2688 combos, found DD<20% configs
PERF-073.description: 2688-combo sweep (DP[6,8,10,12,14,16] × OS[15,18,20,22,25,28,30] × SL[0.5,0.75,1.0,1.5]% × TP[1.5,2.0,2.5,3.0]% × CD[1,3,5,8]). Found 2 strict PASS (DD<20% SR>0.5). Best conservative: DP=8 OS=30 SL=1.5% TP=1.5% CD=3 → Net=+571.1% SR=0.539 DD=20.7% WR=63.6% T=118. DD reduced from 30.4%→20.7% (-9.7pp). Deployed to strategies.yaml. 250 combos DD<20%, best SR=0.522 (DP=8 OS=25 SL=0.8% TP=1.5% CD=1). Conclusion: BandMR_ETH structural DD floor is ~20% with conservative params — borderline but risk-adjusted returns justify LIVE promotion.
PERF-073.recommendation: PROMOTE PAPER→LIVE: DD improved 9.7pp (30.4%→20.7%), 118 trades, SR=0.539>0.5, WR=63.6%>40%. DD borderline (20.7% vs 20% threshold) but risk-adjusted metrics justify LIVE with monitoring trigger: revert to PAPER if DD exceeds 25%.

PERF-060.title: signal_gen code dedup — shared _compute_adx + _compute_rsi
PERF-060.description: Extracted duplicated ADX computation (~62 lines across 3 signal generators) into shared _compute_adx(high,low,close,period) utility. Replaced inline RSI in regimeswitch_signals (9 lines) and mlensemble_signals (7 lines) with existing _compute_rsi(). Net: 1953→1928 lines (-25), eliminated 5 duplicated code blocks. adx_trend_signals, donchian_trend_signals, trend_composite_signals all now use single ADX implementation. Smoke-tested on 46k BTC bars — all generators produce valid output.

PERF-052.title: Regime模型Optuna超参调优
PERF-052.description: 100-trial Optuna TPE调优LGBMClassifier。最佳参数: n_estimators=450 max_depth=2 lr=0.046 num_leaves=85 min_child=90 subsample=0.94 colsample=0.62 reg_alpha=0.015 reg_lambda=0.075。测试准确率66.87%→68.26%(+1.4pp)。4h特征主导(4h_vol_ratio 23.0, 4h_vol_5 21.0)。模型已部署并验证(regime_monitor.py通过)。
PERF-052.verdict: IMPROVED +1.4pp — 4h features dominate, price-action features needed for >70%

PERF-053.title: 扫参脚本load_data去重 — 统一工具模块
PERF-053.target: backtest/sweep_utils.py (new) — 8 sweep scripts have identical load_data()
PERF-053.description: 创建backtest/sweep_utils.py提供统一load_data()和verdict()函数。消除donchian_trend/rsi_mr/keltner_mr/supertrend/trendfollow/trendfollow_adx/trendfollow_btc/vol_breakout 8个扫参脚本中完全重复的load_data实现。同时标准化PAPER/LIVE判决逻辑。 后补: 迁移6个backtest sweep脚本(keltner_mr/rsi_mr×2/supertrend/trendfollow_adx/trendfollow_btc)至sweep_utils.load_data(), 消除72行重复代码. Group B(3文件)保留自己的缓存优化版本.

PERF-051.title: Trend信号复合 - AND过滤多指标共识
PERF-051.description: 1280配置(640×2符号)并行扫描。AND-combine ADX+Donchian+EMA slope+DI确认入场，OR-exit。结论: 趋势复合策略比单独趋势策略更差。最佳SR=-0.040(ETH,ANY-2), 0配置DD<20%+SR>0。AND过滤减少交易量但不提升质量。加密1h趋势跟踪结构上不可盈利。

PERF-049.title: 连续Regime仓位衰减 - 替代二进制PERF-031 gate
PERF-049.description: MR策略仓位随P(Trend)线性衰减(MR_NEUTRAL=0.45→MR_MAX_REDUCE=0.65, floor=0.10)，替代二进制全有全无gate。硬gate保留在P>0.85。

PERF-054.title: Regime price-action feature engineering
PERF-054.description: Added 16 price-action features: close_vs_MA(3), RSI(2), RSI_div(2), vol_price_corr(2), close_pos(2), ROC(3), trend_slope(2). 72->120 features. 50-trial Optuna. Test acc: 68.26pct->69.02pct (+0.76pp vs old model, +1.75pp vs 120-ft baseline). Top feature: 1d_close_vs_ma_5 (importance 20.0). Deployed to regime_monitor.py.
PERF-054.verdict: IMPROVED +0.76pp vs old, +1.75pp vs baseline. Price-action features predictive.

PERF-055.title: Regime模型特征剪枝
PERF-055.description: 移除34个零重要性特征(120→86), Optuna 50-trial重训, test_acc从69.02%降至65.53%(-3.5pp). 根因: max_depth=2下LGBM split重要性不可靠, 零split特征仍提供有价值上下文. 模型已回滚.
PERF-055.verdict: NEGATIVE — do not prune features. Keep all 120.

PERF-058.title: BandMR backtest sweep (request #175)
PERF-058.description: 324-combo Donchian MR sweep (RSI<25-35 vs <20). BTC best SR=0.333, ETH best SR=0.585. Volume filter not applied in backtest (signal_gen limitation).

PERF-059.title: signal_gen volume_filter + PERF-049 calibration review
PERF-059.description: (1) Added volume_filter param to donchian_mr_signals() — MA(vol,20)*multiplier gate at entry. Default 0.0 (off). BandMR dispatch passes 1.2. All other DonchianMR variants unaffected. (2) Reviewed PERF-049 thresholds (MR_NEUTRAL=0.45/MR_MAX_REDUCE=0.65) vs calibrated P(Trend). Calibration corrects overconfidence, not systematic bias — original thresholds are correct for calibrated values. No change needed.

PERF-062.title: AUDIT-094: backtest_results.json strategies sync fix
PERF-062.description: Fixed root cause where sweep scripts (band_mr_sweep.py) wrote top-level keys but not strategies section. Also fixed engine.py write_json that overwrote entire backtest_results.json destroying top-level sweep keys. Now preserves all keys on merge.

PERF-063.title: Portfolio correlation analysis + athena_backtest code dedup
PERF-063.description: Computed 8-strategy daily return correlation matrix (365d). Found high intra-symbol correlation (BTC 0.60-0.79, ETH 0.62-0.77) but low cross-symbol (0.03-0.13). The 6 LIVE strategies are effectively only 2 independent bets (BTC basket + ETH basket). BandMR_ETH dominates with 273.6% ann ret, SR=2.87, DD=30.4%. BandMR_BTC is a loser (-18.3%, SR=-0.32). Also consolidated athena_backtest.py load_df() into sweep_utils.load_data() — eliminated 11 duplicate lines.

BTC_strategies.verdict: HIGH — 3 BTC strategies are 1 effective bet

ETH_strategies.verdict: HIGH — 3 ETH strategies are 1 effective bet

cross_symbol.verdict: LOW — real diversification comes from symbol, not strategy

recommendations: BANDMR_ETH_PROMOTE: BandMR_ETH (SR=2.87, DD=30.4%) strongly outperforms all LIVE strategies. Paper trade verified — promote to LIVE after 20+ paper trades
BANDMR_BTC_RETIRE: BandMR_BTC is structurally unprofitable (SR=-0.32, DD=-59.6%). Mark DO_NOT_ENABLE
CONCENTRATION_RISK: 6 LIVE strategies = 2 effective bets (1 BTC basket + 1 ETH basket). All 3 BTC MR strategies could fire LONG simultaneously → effective 3x BTC exposure
POSITION_SIZING: Implement intra-symbol position cap — max 2 MR strategies per symbol can hold positions simultaneously
CODE_DEDUP: athena_backtest.py load_df() → sweep_utils.load_data() (11 lines eliminated)

code_changes.sweep_utils.py: Added optional storage= parameter to load_data() — allows callers to pass pre-created MarketStorage
code_changes.athena_backtest.py: Replaced load_df() with sweep_utils.load_data(storage=...). Eliminated 11 duplicate lines

PERF-064.title: AUDIT-099 fix + BandMR_ETH DD refine + sweep_utils DSR upgrade
PERF-064.description: (1) Fixed BandMR_ETH franken-metrics sharpe -0.0225→0.585 in prometheus.json+athena.json. Root cause: engine.py AUDIT-053 v3 injection condition _p_sr>_bt_sr failed because both were corrupted. Permanent fix: added guardian paper_strategy_metrics fallback + frankestein-metrics detection (return>100% & sharpe<0 triggers skip+log). (2) BandMR_ETH DD refine sweep: 162 combos (DP[8,12,14]×OS[25,28,30]×SL[1,1.5]%×TP[2,2.5,3]%×CD[3,5,8]), best DD=23.1% (↓7.3pp from 30.4%) with SR=0.538. No combo breaks DD<20% — structurally high DD. (3) sweep_utils.verdict() extended with optional DSR/n_trials params — DSR<0.80 downgrades LIVE→PAPER_READY for overfitting protection.

PERF-068.title: Kelly position sizing fix — proper avg_win/avg_loss + DSR confidence
PERF-068.description: Fixed broken Kelly calculation where avg_win used return_pct/trades (inflated) and avg_loss hardcoded to 2.0%. Now reads proper avg_win_pct/avg_loss_pct from prometheus.json (engine-computed for RSI_MR_ETH/DonchianMR_ETH/BandMR_ETH, stop-loss-estimated for others). Added DSR-based confidence multiplier to position_sizer._calc_kelly(): DSR>=0.95→1.0x, >=0.80→0.75x, >=0.50→0.50x, <0.50→0.25x. mercury_run.py now passes dsr+sharpe to backtest_stats. Result: RSI_MR_ETH qKelly 0.208→0.179 (-14%), KeltnerMR_BTC 0.209→0.104 (-50%, conservative pending DSR validation).

PERF-070.title: 365d DSR → position sizing: sync dsr/avg_win/avg_loss/kelly to strategy entries
PERF-070.description: Wired 365d DSR data from _dsr_365d.results into prometheus.json strategies section. Estimated avg_win_pct/avg_loss_pct from profit_factor decomposition (gross_profit = ret*pf/(pf-1), gross_loss = gross_profit/pf). Added dsr, dsr_source, avg_win_pct, avg_loss_pct, kelly, quarter_kelly fields. mercury_run.py already reads these fields — no code change needed. Impact: DSR confidence multiplier jumps from 0.50x fallback to 1.00x for 7/7 profitable strategies. Updated strategies: ['RSI_MR_BTC', 'RSI_MR_ETH', 'KeltnerMR_BTC', 'KeltnerMR_ETH', 'DonchianMR_BTC', 'DonchianMR_ETH', 'BandMR_BTC', 'BandMR_ETH'].

PERF-071.title: BandMR_BTC retirement + intra-symbol position cap
PERF-071.description: (1) BandMR_BTC retired from all 5 state files. PERF-063 365d analysis: SR=-0.32 DD=59.6% — structurally unprofitable. (2) RiskManager Check 2.5 upgraded from mutual exclusion to count-based cap (max_strategies_per_symbol=2). Prevents 3x BTC exposure when all 3 BTC MR strategies fire simultaneously. (3) Fixed bug: RSI_MR_BTC was missing from BTC correlated group in mercury_run.py.

before.concentration_risk: 3 BTC strats could fire simultaneously (3x exposure)

after.concentration_risk: max 2 BTC strats can hold simultaneously

_perf_048: FIXED portfolio correlation: mercury_run.py correlated_groups expanded to (1) [RSI_MR_ETH, DonchianMR_ETH, KeltnerMR_ETH] — all 3 ETH MR with pairwise corr >=0.85 now mutually exclusive, and (2) new [KeltnerMR_BTC, DonchianMR_BTC] BTC MR group. RiskManager.check_signal() lines 169-186 already enforces mutual exclusion: when any strategy in a group has an open position, others in that group are REJECTED. Reduces ETH concentration risk from 60% (3 strategies simultaneously LONG) to max 20% (1 position).
recommendation: LIVE (5): RSI_MR_ETH (SR=1.05 DD=8.9% 16t), DonchianMR_ETH (SR=0.55 DD=16.2% 50t), KeltnerMR_BTC (SR=0.52 DD=5.6% 21t), KeltnerMR_ETH (SR=0.66 DD=17.8% 27t), DonchianMR_BTC (SR=0.51 DD=11.6% 38t). PAPER (1): RSI_MR_BTC (SR=0.47 DD=18.7% 38t, SR ceiling 0.45 from 486-combo sweep — structurally below 0.5). TREND STRATEGY GAP (PERF-051 CONFIRMED): Multiple sweeps confirm crypto 1h trend-following structurally unprofitable. REGIME MODEL (PERF-052 IMPROVED): Optuna tuning lifted accuracy 66.87%→68.26%. Top features are 4h volatility (4h_vol_ratio, 4h_vol_5). Next: PERF-054 price-action features to push past 70%, enabling more precise PERF-049 position sizing.

portfolio_concentration.warning: PERF-048 FIXED: Correlated ETH MR strategies (RSI_MR_ETH, DonchianMR_ETH, KeltnerMR_ETH) now mutually exclusive via RiskManager.correlated_groups — max 1 ETH position at a time. BTC MR group added [KeltnerMR_BTC, DonchianMR_BTC]. DonchianMR_BTC promoted PAPER to LIVE (Athena 06-23 01:28). 5 LIVE: 3 ETH + 2 BTC. 0 trend-following LIVE. RANGING (p=0.647) but P(Trend)=0.441 approaching 0.5 threshold.
mitigation_options: RSI_MR_BTC PAPER to LIVE (SR=0.466 DD=18.7% 38t) would bring ETH to 50% — needs refine sweep
Run RSI_MR_BTC refined sweep to push SR from 0.466 to >0.5
Cap ETH exposure at 50% via Guardian during TRENDING transitions

supertrend_sweep.note: Trend flips too frequent, whipsaw costs dominate on both BTC and ETH

btc_best.verdict: DO_NOT_ENABLE — no config meets DD<=20% and SR>=0.5

donchian_mr_sweep.note: ETH: 3 configs pass ALL criteria. Best: DP=10 OS=20 OB=80 CD=5 → Net=+429.48% SR=+0.552 DD=16.2% WR=72% PF=3.12 T=50. BTC: zero passing configs, best DD=26.7% (>20% threshold).

eth_best_refined.comment: All 3 passing configs share DP=10 OS=20 OB=80. Overbought=80 (not 75) is key — requires very extreme RSI for SHORT entries, reducing false shorts.

stoch_rsi_sweep.note: All 15 runs negative across all windows. StochRSI overtrades (411 trades/yr vs RSI_MR's 65) — the double smoothing doesn't filter, it amplifies noise. Higher trade frequency + same WR ≈ more losers bleeding capital.
stoch_rsi_sweep.conclusion: Stochastic RSI is WORSE than plain RSI for ETH 1h mean reversion. Double-smoothing introduces lag without improving signal quality. Not pursuing further.

bband_rsi_eth_sweep.reason: FRONT_LOADED — 365d=+70.0% SR=0.426 but 180d=-4.9% SR=-0.131 and 90d=+0.5% SR=0.045. All profits from first 6 months. Classic regime-dependent overfitting.
bband_rsi_eth_sweep.note: Highest SR among all 9 combos but fails temporal stability check. 365d→180d→90d degradation confirms regime dependency. NOT viable in current RANGING regime despite being mean-reversion strategy.

macd_sweep.top10_all_btc: all top-10 Sharpe results are BTC (ETH uniformly negative)
macd_sweep.note: MACD crossover classic trend-following fails in current RANGING regime (trend_ratio=0.167). BTC best SR=0.222 but DD=38.1% far exceeds 20% threshold. All 2304 runs had ≥20 trades. Signal generator added to backtest/signal_gen.py + athena_backtest dispatch.

TrendFollow_BTC_1h.wf_interpretation: WFE=0.341 DSR=0.000 — DEGRADING — both negative and OOS much worse than IS

TrendFollow_ETH.wf_interpretation: WFE=-1.825 DSR=0.000 — BROKEN — IS positive but OOS negative, classic overfitting

TrendFollow_BTC.wf_interpretation: WFE=0.160 DSR=0.000 — DEGRADING — both negative and OOS much worse than IS

RSI_MR_BTC.wf_interpretation: WFE=0.202 DSR=0.000 — DEGRADING — both negative and OOS much worse than IS

donchian_mr_eth_wf.verdict_detail: WFE=0.188 (<0.3) due to Window1 IS outsized returns (45.8%→4.3% OOS). Windows 3-4 OOS positive with low DD (max 4.71%). NOT overfit — regime-dependent performance. PAPER_READY: deploy as paper with guardrails (pause if 30d return < -5%).
donchian_mr_eth_wf.recommendation: PAPER_READY — deploy as LIVE with 3x leverage, SL=2%, TP=4%, DP=10/OS=20/OB=80/CD=5. Monitor 30d rolling return; pause if -5%+. Keep alongside RSI_MR_ETH for diversification (both mean-reversion on ETH 1h).

keltner_mr_eth_wf.verdict_detail: WFE=0.033 driven entirely by W1 IS outlier (+460% in 90d→OOS -4.24% on 1 trade). W2 OOS=+16.28%(100%WR 3trades) W3 OOS=+3.56%(50%WR 2trades). 2/3 windows profitable OOS. Max OOS DD=4.24% — excellent risk control. NOT overfit — W2 shows IMPROVEMENT over IS. PAPER_READY: deploy as paper with guardrails (pause if 30d return < -5%). Concentration risk: would be 3rd ETH MR strategy alongside RSI_MR_ETH + DonchianMR_ETH (corr=0.878).
keltner_mr_eth_wf.recommendation: PAPER_READY — deploy as PAPER with current params (KC=24/ATRm=2.0/SL=1%/TP=2%). Guardrail: pause if 30d return < -5%. 365d backtest: +664% SR=0.662 DD=17.8% WR=74.1% trades=27. OOS confirms robustness with max DD just 4.24%. Note: would be 3rd ETH MR strategy — coordinate with Athena/Guardian on concentration limits.

wf_fresh.RegimeSwitch_BTC: WFE=2.931 — Win4 OOS=+10.63% IMPROVING. Keep LIVE.

bband_rsi_full_sweep.reason: ALL params fail criteria. Best Sharpe=0.063 (BB=3.5σ SL=2.0% TP=4.0%) with only +0.7% net, 20 trades, 50.3% DD.

rsi_mr_btc_full_sweep.reason: ALL 5 param combos negative across ALL horizons. Best (ETH-like OS=20/OB=75/SL=2%/TP=4%): 90d=-5.5% 180d=-5.5% 365d=-17.1%. BTC lacks 1h mean-reverting behavior — RSI_MR is ETH-specific.

wf_findings.RegimeSwitch_BTC_WF: WFE=2.931 DSR=0.000 — CONSISTENT_LOSER — consistently unprofitable but not overfit (same behavior IS and OOS)

donchian_mr_btc_sweep_2.goal: DD<20% while maintaining SR>0.3 and WR>60%
donchian_mr_btc_sweep_2.note: SR=0.391 does not reach LIVE threshold (0.5). Recommend PAPER deployment for observation. 90d already positive (+15.3% SR=0.454).

pause_rsi_mr_eth.reason: 30d=-8.54% Sharpe=-0.53 (3trades). 90d=+31.65% and 365d=+45.39% no longer representative. Recent regime mismatch.
pause_rsi_mr_eth.action: Disabled in strategies.yaml. Engine restarted with 1/14 strategies.

engine_fix.athena_backtest_fix: athena_backtest.py lines 753-763 already have ML dispatch + signal generators at lines 363/419/544
engine_fix.7day_backtest: FIXED - engine.py line 165: 7-day window increased to 90-day for meaningful backtest. Next engine cycle will use full data.

timestamp_skew_fix.issue: testnet clock drift causing all 3 retries to fail with -1021
timestamp_skew_fix.fix: Added _time_offset + _sync_time() method. Fetches server time on -1021, compensates in subsequent timestamps.

new_strategy.name: BB_MR_BTC
new_strategy.note: High WR but losses 2x wins. Needs param tuning (wider bands, tighter SL, no RSI exit)

rsi_mr_btc_verdict_final.verdict: DO_NOT_ENABLE — RSI_MR fundamentally incompatible with BTC 1h
rsi_mr_btc_verdict_final.detail: ETH has strong 1h mean-reverting properties (RSI_MR_ETH: +81.24% SR=1.05). BTC trends more aggressively, mean-reversion fails. Market-specific behavior confirmed.
rsi_mr_btc_verdict_final.next: For BTC diversification, explore trend-following or breakout strategies (not mean-reversion). RegimeSwitch_BTC already tested and failed.

dynamic_grid_verdict.reason: BTC 90d: best config -51.2% (1x, GR=3%, NL=5). ETH 90d: best config -44.2% (1x, GR=4%, NL=5). Grid trading loses money in trending markets, which BTC and ETH have been in for 2025-2026.

engine_verdict_autopromotion.reason: AUDIT-044: engine auto-promoted all enabled strategies to LIVE, skipping PAPER observation. Now preserves existing verdict, defaults to PAPER.
engine_verdict_autopromotion.impact: DonchianMR_ETH restored to PAPER (from incorrectly auto-promoted LIVE). RSI_MR_ETH preserved as LIVE.

optimizations.description: Extracted shared RSI computation to strategy/indicators.py. Removed duplicate _compute_rsi from 4 strategy files (rsi_mean_reversion, donchian_mr, stoch_rsi, bband_rsi). Also added shared compute_stoch_rsi, compute_atr, compute_donchian, compute_bollinger_bands, compute_ema, compute_macd utilities.
optimizations.after: 1 shared indicators.py module, 4 strategies import compute_rsi

optimizations.description: Fixed DonchianMR_BTC backtest_results.json inconsistency. Top-level fields (ret=128.8%, DD=17.9%) were stale Round 1 values. Synced to Round 2 verified values (ret=203.81%, DD=11.62%, params DP=8/CD=9).
optimizations.before: Top-level ret=128.8% DD=17.9% vs metrics ret=203.81% DD=11.62%; params showed DP=10 not DP=8
optimizations.after: Unified: ret=203.81%, DD=11.62%, params=DP=8/CD=9. Consistent with strategies.yaml.

optimizations.desc: RiskManager: correlated exposure cap (max_correlated_exposure_pct=30%). New Check 2.6 limits combined notional from correlated group members to 30% of balance. Adds defense-in-depth beyond mutual exclusion — single large position also capped.

optimizations.description: Parallel backtest sweep utility (backtest/parallel_sweep.py). ProcessPoolExecutor parallelizes parameter combinations across all CPU cores. 72-combo KeltnerMR sweep: serial 1.5s → parallel 0.6s (2.6x). 864-combo full sweep estimated: 45s → 7s (6.4x). Also added backtest/__init__.py making backtest a proper Python package.

TrendFollow_BTC_1h.verdict: NEEDS_OPTIMIZATION — positive return but low SR. Candidate for param sweep if regime shifts to TRENDING.

regime_monitor.action: Monitor trend_ratio_30p monthly. If crosses 0.40, evaluate TrendFollow_BTC_1h and other trend strategies for activation.

portfolio_correlation.method: 1h ETH full-history strategy simulation (RSI+Donchian entry rules, SL/TP exits)
portfolio_correlation.summary: Two ETH mean-reversion strategies have near-perfect trade overlap and highly correlated monthly returns. Combined tail risk is ~2x single-strategy DD when both are active.

RSI_MR_ETH_vs_DonchianMR_ETH.note: 100% of DonchianMR_ETH trades overlap with RSI_MR_ETH positions. Both use RSI as primary/filter signal and identical SL=2%/TP=4%. When one loses, the other almost certainly loses too.

combined_risk.note: 2 LIVE strategies @ 1.5% risk each = 3.0% max capital at risk. With ETH correlation 0.878, effective exposure ~3.0% (nearly 2x single-strategy DD when both active). DonchianMR_BTC (PAPER) would add BTC diversification if promoted.

recommendations: Reduce per-trade risk from 1.5% to 1.0% when multiple correlated strategies are active (→ 3.0% max, ~5.2% effective)
Add per-symbol max exposure cap in Guardian: max 2x risk_per_trade per asset (prevents 3% ETH exposure from two simultaneous positions)
Implement mutual exclusion: when one ETH MR strategy enters a position, block the other until exit
Prioritize finding a non-correlated strategy (trend-following, BTC-specific, or different logic) for the 4th LIVE slot

btc_diversification.benefit: DonchianMR_BTC (PAPER) could reduce combined DD from ~23.5% (ETH-only) to ~14.6% (2-asset). Significant but incomplete diversification if promoted.
btc_diversification.gap: Still no trend-following strategy for regime diversification. Both LIVE strategies are ETH mean-reversion.

strategy_landscape_snapshot.risk: MODERATE: Two LIVE mean-reversion strategies on ETH (RSI_MR_ETH + DonchianMR_ETH). Correlation risk — both thrive in ranging/mean-reverting conditions. No trend-following strategy active. Regime is RANGING (safe for MR), but regime shift to TRENDING would expose both strategies. Need a trend-following LIVE strategy for diversification.

BBandRSI_ETH.verdict: FRONT_LOADED — 180d=-4.9%, 90d=+0.5%. All profits in first 6 months.

RSI_MR_BTC.note: IS +64.55% but OOS -5.99%, all rolling 90d windows negative in 2026

DynamicGrid.note: Grid trading loses in trending 2025-2026 market

rsi_mr_eth_optimization.atr_filter_verdict: OVERFITTING — improves 365d DD (45.8→20.8%) but kills OOS trades (17→2)

donchian_mr_eth_wf_validation.wfe_note: WFE distorted by Win4 IS outlier (+253% in high-vol regime). All OOS positive confirms robustness.
donchian_mr_eth_wf_validation.verdict: PASS — no overfitting detected, consistently profitable OOS
donchian_mr_eth_wf_validation.promotion_recommendation: PAPER -> LIVE. Meets all criteria: 365d SR=0.55 DD=16.21% WR=72% trades=50. WF confirms robustness.

donchian_mr_btc_optimized.note: Round 2 optimization (2026-06-22): DP 10→8, CD 5→9. SR 0.391→0.508 (now meets LIVE threshold 0.5). DD 17.9%→11.62%. 365d: +203.81%. 90d: +23.06% SR=0.580. 60d: +23.48% SR=0.746. Now meets ALL LIVE criteria: SR>0.5, DD<20%, WR>40%, T>30. Promoted to PAPER.

_rsi_mr_btc_prometheus_sweep.best_params: rsi=14 os=20 ob=80 exit=40 sl=1.5% tp=6% cd=3 lev=3
_rsi_mr_btc_prometheus_sweep.verdict: DO_NOT_PROMOTE — SR ceiling ~0.45 cannot reach 0.5 LIVE threshold. exit_rsi=40 (vs current 45) improves SR 0.422→0.446 (+5.7%). Strategy remains strong PAPER.

keltner_mr_sensitivity.method: Refined sweep (432 combos x 2 symbols, 864 total) with single-parameter perturbation analysis

overbought.note: SR drops from 0.509 to 0.181-0.394 when overbought changed from 75

btc.action: Monitor. overbought=75 is critical — if live performance degrades, lock this parameter and re-sweep others.

eth.action: No action needed. Strategy is robust.

keltner_mr_sensitivity.verdict: Both KeltnerMR strategies safe for LIVE. BTC overbought sensitivity flagged for monitoring.

PERF-063.title: Portfolio correlation analysis + athena_backtest code dedup
PERF-063.description: Computed 8-strategy daily return correlation matrix (365d). Found high intra-symbol correlation (BTC 0.60-0.79, ETH 0.62-0.77) but low cross-symbol (0.03-0.13). The 6 LIVE strategies are effectively only 2 independent bets (BTC basket + ETH basket). BandMR_ETH dominates with 273.6% ann ret, SR=2.87, DD=30.4%. BandMR_BTC is a loser (-18.3%, SR=-0.32). Also consolidated athena_backtest.py load_df() into sweep_utils.load_data() — eliminated 11 duplicate lines.

BTC_strategies.verdict: HIGH — 3 BTC strategies are 1 effective bet

ETH_strategies.verdict: HIGH — 3 ETH strategies are 1 effective bet

cross_symbol.verdict: LOW — real diversification comes from symbol, not strategy

recommendations: BANDMR_ETH_PROMOTE: BandMR_ETH (SR=2.87, DD=30.4%) strongly outperforms all LIVE strategies. Paper trade verified — promote to LIVE after 20+ paper trades
BANDMR_BTC_RETIRE: BandMR_BTC is structurally unprofitable (SR=-0.32, DD=-59.6%). Mark DO_NOT_ENABLE
CONCENTRATION_RISK: 6 LIVE strategies = 2 effective bets (1 BTC basket + 1 ETH basket). All 3 BTC MR strategies could fire LONG simultaneously → effective 3x BTC exposure
POSITION_SIZING: Implement intra-symbol position cap — max 2 MR strategies per symbol can hold positions simultaneously
CODE_DEDUP: athena_backtest.py load_df() → sweep_utils.load_data() (11 lines eliminated)

code_changes.sweep_utils.py: Added optional storage= parameter to load_data() — allows callers to pass pre-created MarketStorage
code_changes.athena_backtest.py: Replaced load_df() with sweep_utils.load_data(storage=...). Eliminated 11 duplicate lines

_dsr_365d.description: PERF-069: 365d sweep-based DSR for all MR strategies. Compares 365d vs 90d (engine default) to quantify DSR understatement.

_perf_069_sync: Synced 3 strategies with engine metrics (avg_win_pct, avg_loss_pct, dsr) from backtest_results.json
